headline: Constellation Brands, Inc. (STZ) Names Nicholas Fink as its New CEO
summary: Constellation Brands, Inc. (NYSE:STZ) is among the 12 Best Alcohol Stocks to Buy Right Now. On February 12, 2026, Reuters reported that Constellation Brands, Inc. (NYSE:STZ) appointed Nicholas Fink as chief executive officer, succeeding Bill Newlands, as the brewer deals with demand issues. Fink, who formerly oversaw Fortune Brands Innovations, will take over as CEO […]
